case_title: AAVIZ TRAVEL PLANNER VS SOLIS EILEEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS EILEEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,646.60 FILED BY AAVIZ TRAVEL PLANNER AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS EILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
